title: An Act to amend the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (cessation of refugee protection)
fullText: C-213 1 45 3 Charles III 2025 An Act to amend the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (cessation of refugee protection) An Act to amend the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act (cessation of refugee protection) 2025 6 18 Ms. Kwan 451039 SUMMARY This enactment amends the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act to repeal provisions related to inadmissibility and loss of status resulting from the cessation of refugee protection for permanent residents. His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows: 2001, c. 27 Immigration and Refugee Protection Act 1 Section 40.1 of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act is repealed. 2 Paragraph 46(1)(c.1) of the Act is repealed.

sections.text: 1 Section 40.1 of the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act is repealed.
2 Paragraph 46(1)(c.1) of the Act is repealed.
